title: Data Logger
description: A data logger is a device that can record, store, and transmit data to a server. Data loggers can operate autonomously or in a hybrid mode, either via the internet or the power grid.

title: Two-Way Nurse Call
description: The Wireless Two-Way Nurse Call System is an advanced solution for direct communication between patients and medical staff without the use of cables.

title: One-Way Nurse Call
description: The Wireless One-Way Nurse Call System is a nurse call system used in hospitals that is installed at each patient’s bedside.
